name: khazana

concept.meaning: khazana (खज़ाना) — treasury / vault. A curated vault of the world's best signal.
concept.idea: A single minimal gem (the treasure) whose central girdle reads as a terminal text-line / cursor — fusing the two halves of the product: the instrument (terminal, precise) and the artifact (editorial, permanent).
concept.voice: terminal × editorial (NYT-graphics restraint). Lines, not boxes. One amber accent used with discipline.
symbolism: gem = treasure / khazana / something rare and kept
horizontal girdle line = a terminal line of output / a cursor / a horizon
amber = signal light (the instrument); the only chromatic note
lowercase wordmark = approachable, modern, editorial calm

palette.usage: Mark is amber on ground (dark) or amber on warm-white (light). Wordmark is ink. Clay reserved for the editorial accent (e.g. the period in 'khazana.'); never the mark.

terminal.font: monospace — JetBrains Mono / Berkeley Mono / SF Mono, weight 600, letter-spacing -0.01em
terminal.prompt: a leading amber '›' chevron (the terminal prompt). No blinking cursor.
terminal.use: app chrome, nav, favicons, dense UI

editorial.font: Fraunces (variable, opsz high), weight 500, optical display

mark.name: the gem

geometry.girdle: horizontal line y=13 from x=6 to x=26 (the terminal line)

mark.style: stroke-only, round joins, no fill (or 6% amber fill at large sizes). Amber stroke.
mark.svg: <svg viewBox="0 0 32 32" fill="none" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"><path d="M6 13 L16 4 L26 13 L16 28 Z" stroke="#ffb627" stroke-width="2" stroke-linejoin="round"/><path d="M6 13 H26" stroke="#ffb627" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round"/><path d="M16 4 V13 M11 13 L16 28 M21 13 L16 28" stroke="#ffb627" stroke-width="1.1" stroke-linecap="round" opacity="0.45"/></svg>

favicon.shape: the gem, amber stroke, on transparent or on #0a0a0b rounded-square (radius 6/32)

spacing.clearspace: minimum padding around the lockup = the height of the gem's girdle-to-apex (≈ x-height of the wordmark)

motion.policy: The mark is STILL by default (founder removed the blinking cursor). Any animation is optional, subtle, and reduced-motion-gated: e.g. a one-time amber girdle-line sweep on first load. Never a persistent blink.

do: amber for the mark only; ink for the wordmark
give it clearspace; let it breathe
use the terminal lockup in-app, the editorial lockup for covers
dont: don't fill the gem with solid amber at small sizes
don't add gradients, bevels, or shadows (lines, not boxes)
don't recolor the mark to clay
don't stretch or rotate the gem
